ham.subject: Your Order #12345678 has Shipped – Confirmation
ham.body:
Hello John,

Thank you for shopping with us! Your order has shipped and is on its way.

Order Number: 12345678
Items:
- Widget A x2
- Widget B x1

Shipping Address:
John Doe
123 Maple Street
Anytown, CA 12345

Tracking Number: 1Z999AA10123456784

You can track your shipment at <URL>

If you have any questions, feel free to contact our support team.

Thank you for choosing Amazon!

Best regards,
Amazon Customer Service

spam.subject: Urgent: Action Required – Missed Delivery Fee Notice
